text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after the Japanese Derby, Tokai Teio
begins training hard for the Kikuka Sho. It's said
only the strongest Umamusume can win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she pushes herself too hard and hurts
her legs. She's told she may not even be able to
enter the Kikuka Sho in her state.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nonetheless, she stubbornly insists on continuing
to train, declaring she'll enter the race no matter
what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her so fired up, I look into various types of
treatment for her, and eventually she gets back
to running form.
